title: GPT-5.5 is a total freak
summary: AI Search reviews OpenAI's GPT-5.5, testing its performance across diverse tasks including code generation, image processing, cancer detection, 3D rendering, and music composition. The channel benchmarks the model and evaluates its tendency to hallucinate while providing guidance on deployment use cases.
